privacy.pageSubtitle: How PaySentinelIQ collects, uses, and protects your data — fully aligned with Brazil's LGPD (Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados).
privacy.introParagraph1: PaySentinelIQ is an AI-powered payroll verification and fraud risk intelligence platform. Our system analyzes financial documents — including pay stubs, receipts, bank slips, and reports — using Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and artificial intelligence to detect anomalies, prevent fraud, and automate financial compliance workflows.
privacy.introParagraph2: This Privacy Policy explains in clear terms what data we collect, why we collect it, how we protect it, and what rights you have under Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD — Lei nº 13.709/2018).
privacy.introParagraph3: By using PaySentinelIQ, you entrust us with sensitive financial documents. We take that responsibility seriously. Every feature is designed with privacy and security as foundational requirements, not afterthoughts.
privacy.lgpdNoticeText: PaySentinelIQ operates in full compliance with Brazil's LGPD. We are committed to the principles of purpose limitation, data minimization, transparency, security, and accountability. All personal data processing has a valid legal basis under Articles 7 and 11 of the LGPD.
privacy.authDataDesc: When you create an account or sign in, we collect the following information to identify you and secure your access:
privacy.authDataName: Full name (as provided by you or your authentication provider)
privacy.authDataEmail: Email address (used as your primary identifier and for service communications)
privacy.authDataAvatar: Profile picture URL (when signing in via Google OIDC or similar providers)
privacy.uploadedDataDesc: The core functionality of PaySentinelIQ involves analyzing financial documents. When you upload files, we process:
privacy.uploadedPdfs: PDF documents (pay stubs, receipts, bank slips, contracts, reports)
privacy.uploadedImages: Image files (scanned documents, screenshots of financial records)
privacy.uploadedReceipts: Receipts and proof of payment documents
privacy.ocrDataDesc: Our OCR engine processes uploaded documents to extract structured information. This may include:
privacy.ocrText: Recognized text from documents (names, amounts, dates, identifiers)
privacy.ocrMetadata: Document metadata (file type, size, page count, creation date)
privacy.ocrFinancial: Financial information detected (salary amounts, tax IDs, bank codes, payment values)
privacy.logDataDesc: For security, auditing, and operational monitoring, we maintain logs of:
privacy.logActions: Actions performed within the platform (uploads, analyses, report generation)
privacy.logSecurity: Security events (login attempts, permission changes, data exports)
privacy.purposeIntro: Every piece of data we collect serves a specific, legitimate purpose directly related to the services we provide:
privacy.purposeAuthDesc: To verify your identity, manage sessions, and ensure only authorized users access your account and data.
privacy.purposeFraudDesc: To detect anomalies, identify potential payroll fraud, assess risk scores, and flag suspicious patterns in financial documents.
privacy.purposeAnalysisDesc: To extract, structure, and analyze information from uploaded financial documents using optical character recognition and AI.
privacy.purposeReportsDesc: To produce verification reports, compliance summaries, and risk assessments based on analyzed data.
privacy.purposeImprovementDesc: To improve the accuracy of our AI models, enhance fraud detection algorithms, and optimize user experience — always using anonymized and aggregated data where possible.
privacy.legalBasisText: Our processing of personal data is based on: (I) your explicit consent when creating an account and accepting these terms; (II) the legitimate interest of fraud prevention and financial security; (V) contractual necessity for delivering our analysis services; and (VI) compliance with legal obligations under Brazilian labor and tax regulations.
privacy.sharingIntro: We do not sell your data. Period. Data may only be shared with infrastructure providers strictly necessary to operate the service:
privacy.sharingAWSDesc: Your uploaded documents are stored in Amazon S3, a secure cloud storage service. Data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). S3 buckets are private and not publicly accessible.
privacy.sharingGoogleDesc: When you choose to sign in with Google, we verify your identity through Google's OIDC service. Only your name and email are shared with us. Google's use of your data is governed by their own privacy policy.
privacy.sharingOCRDesc: Document text extraction may be performed by Tesseract OCR (local, no data transmission) or, optionally, by cloud-based OCR services (AWS Textract). When cloud OCR is used, documents are transmitted over encrypted channels and processed in your selected AWS region.
privacy.sharingMonitoringDesc: We use Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring. Sentry is configured to not collect personally identifiable information (sendDefaultPII is disabled). Only error stack traces and anonymized telemetry are transmitted.
privacy.sharingNoSell: We do not sell, rent, trade, or otherwise disclose your personal data to third parties for their commercial purposes.
privacy.securityIntro: Protecting your financial data is our highest priority. We implement multiple layers of security:
privacy.securityEncryptionDesc: All stored data — including uploaded documents, extracted fields, and user profiles — is encrypted using AES-256 encryption. This applies to both database storage and S3 document storage.
privacy.securityHTTPSDesc: All communication between your browser and our servers is encrypted using TLS 1.3, the latest and most secure transport layer protocol. HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is enforced with a 2-year max-age policy.
privacy.securityAuthDesc: Access to the platform requires valid credentials. We support secure authentication via email/password with bcrypt hashing, Google OIDC with verified tokens, and optional Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) via TOTP authenticator apps.
privacy.securityAccessDesc: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) ensures users can only access data and features appropriate to their role. Roles include: Viewer, Fraud Analyst, Compliance Officer, HR Manager, Payroll Manager, Auditor, and Super Admin. Multi-tenancy isolation prevents cross-tenant data access.
privacy.securityAuditDesc: All significant actions — uploads, analyses, report generation, data exports, account changes — are recorded in append-only, immutable audit logs. These logs capture who performed the action, when, from which IP address, and what was changed.
privacy.securityMFADesc: Users can enable MFA to add an additional layer of security. MFA uses time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) compatible with any authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, Microsoft Authenticator, etc.).
privacy.retentionIntro: We retain your data only for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations:
privacy.retentionDocumentsDesc: Financial documents are retained for 7 years (2,555 days) to comply with Brazilian labor law (Article 11 of CLT) and tax record-keeping requirements. You may request earlier deletion if not legally required.
privacy.retentionOCRDesc: Intermediate files generated during OCR processing (temporary images, extracted text buffers) are automatically deleted within 24 hours of processing completion.
privacy.retentionLogsDesc: Security and audit logs are retained for 5 years (1,825 days) for compliance and forensic purposes.
privacy.retentionAccountDesc: Upon account deletion, your personal profile data is anonymized and your documents are marked for permanent removal within 30 days (grace period). After the grace period, all remaining personal data is permanently deleted.
privacy.rightsIntro: Brazil's LGPD (Articles 17-22) grants you specific rights regarding your personal data. PaySentinelIQ fully supports all of them:
privacy.rightAccessDesc: You can request confirmation of whether we process your personal data and obtain a copy of all data we hold about you.
privacy.rightCorrectionDesc: You can request correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated personal data.
privacy.rightAnonymizationDesc: You can request anonymization, blocking, or elimination of unnecessary or excessive data, or data processed in violation of LGPD.
privacy.rightPortabilityDesc: You can request export of your data in a structured, machine-readable format (ZIP with JSON) for transfer to another service.
privacy.rightDeletionDesc: You can request deletion of your personal data processed with your consent, subject to legal retention obligations.
privacy.rightRevocationDesc: You can withdraw your consent at any time through your account settings or by contacting our privacy team. Revocation does not affect the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal.
privacy.deletionIntro: You can request account deletion at any time. The process follows these steps:
privacy.deletionStep1: Submit deletion request through your account settings or by contacting us.
privacy.deletionStep2: Your account is immediately deactivated and your personal identifiers are anonymized.
privacy.deletionStep3: All your uploaded documents are queued for permanent deletion from our storage systems.
privacy.deletionStep4: A 30-day grace period allows you to reverse the deletion if the request was made in error.
privacy.deletionStep5: After the grace period, all remaining personal data is permanently and irreversibly deleted. Anonymized audit trail records may be retained for legal compliance.
privacy.exportIntro: Under LGPD Article 18, Section V, you have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format. PaySentinelIQ provides data export in ZIP format containing JSON files.
privacy.exportProfile: Your user profile information (name, email, role, account dates)
privacy.exportConsent: Complete consent history with version numbers and timestamps
privacy.exportDocuments: Metadata for all uploaded documents (file names, types, upload dates)
privacy.exportReports: Verification reports and analysis results associated with your account
privacy.exportActivity: Recent activity history and notification records
privacy.consentIntro: We require explicit, informed consent before processing your personal data. Consent is captured when you create an account, and you must actively check a box confirming you have read and agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
privacy.consentRecord: Every consent event is permanently recorded with:
privacy.consentVersion: The exact version of the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy you accepted
privacy.consentTimestamp: The precise date and time (UTC) when consent was given
privacy.consentIP: Your IP address at the time of consent (for audit trail integrity)
privacy.consentMethod: The method by which consent was captured (checkbox, OAuth, or manual recording)
privacy.consentWithdraw: You can withdraw consent at any time. To do so, go to your Account Settings or contact privacy@paysentineliq.com. Withdrawing consent may limit your ability to use certain features of the platform.
privacy.cookiesIntro: PaySentinelIQ uses minimal cookies strictly necessary for platform functionality:
privacy.cookiesEssentialDesc: Required for authentication and security. These cookies maintain your login session and protect against cross-site request forgery (CSRF). They do not track you across other websites.
privacy.cookiesPreferencesDesc: Store your interface preferences (theme, language, font size, accessibility settings) locally to provide a consistent experience across sessions.
privacy.cookiesAnalyticsDesc: Sentry error tracking sets a minimal cookie for session identification in error reports. This cookie does not contain personal information and is used solely for debugging purposes.
privacy.cookiesNoTracking: We do not use third-party tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies that profile your behavior. There are no hidden trackers, no fingerprinting, and no cross-site tracking.
privacy.minorsIntro: PaySentinelIQ is a business-to-business platform designed for corporate payroll and financial teams. We do not knowingly collect or process personal data from individuals under 18 years of age. If we become aware that a minor has provided personal data without parental consent, we will take steps to delete such information promptly.
privacy.minorsAction: If you believe a minor has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately at privacy@paysentineliq.com.
privacy.termsSubtitle: By using PaySentinelIQ, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
privacy.changesIntro: We may update this Privacy Policy and Terms of Use from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or service features. When we make material changes, we will notify you through the platform (in-app notification or email) at least 30 days before the changes take effect.
privacy.changesNotice: Continued use of PaySentinelIQ after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. If you do not agree with the changes, you may close your account and request deletion of your data.
privacy.contactIntro: We are committed to transparency and accountability. If you have questions about this policy, wish to exercise your LGPD rights, or need to report a data protection concern, please contact us:
privacy.contactResponseTime: We aim to respond to all privacy inquiries within 5 business days, as required by LGPD.
privacy.termsUseIntro: PaySentinelIQ grants you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the platform for legitimate payroll verification, fraud detection, and financial compliance purposes. Permitted uses include:
privacy.termsUse1: Uploading and analyzing payroll documents and financial records you are legally authorized to process.
privacy.termsUse2: Generating risk assessments and verification reports for internal compliance purposes.
privacy.termsUse3: Using AI-powered fraud detection features to identify anomalies in your own organization's data.
privacy.termsUse4: Managing employee records and payroll data within the scope of your organizational role.
privacy.termsRespIntro: As a user of PaySentinelIQ, you are responsible for:
privacy.termsResp1: Ensuring you have the legal right and necessary consent to process any personal data contained in uploaded documents. You are the data controller for data you upload; PaySentinelIQ acts as a data processor.
privacy.termsResp2: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
privacy.termsResp3: Using the platform in compliance with all applicable laws, including but not limited to Brazil's LGPD, labor regulations (CLT), and anti-fraud legislation.
privacy.termsProhibIntro: The following activities are strictly prohibited and may result in immediate account suspension and potential legal action:
privacy.termsProhibFraudDesc: Using PaySentinelIQ to facilitate, conceal, or enable any form of payroll fraud, tax evasion, or financial crime.
privacy.termsProhibFakeDesc: Uploading forged, altered, or otherwise falsified documents with the intent to deceive the verification system or obtain fraudulent risk assessments.
privacy.termsProhibAbuseDesc: Attempting to circumvent security measures, probe for vulnerabilities, reverse engineer AI models, overload the system with malicious traffic, or otherwise interfere with the platform's normal operation.
privacy.termsProhibReverseDesc: Accessing data belonging to other tenants, users, or organizations without proper authorization. Attempting to bypass RBAC controls or multi-tenancy isolation.
privacy.termsProhibUnauthorizedDesc: Uploading documents or data that violate any applicable law, regulation, or third-party rights.
privacy.termsLiability1: PaySentinelIQ provides AI-assisted analysis and risk scoring as decision-support tools. The platform does not replace professional judgment, legal advice, or formal audit processes. Final decisions based on PaySentinelIQ outputs remain your responsibility.
privacy.termsLiability2: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PaySentinelIQ shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform, including but not limited to financial losses, regulatory penalties, or reputational harm.
privacy.termsLiability3: Our total liability for any claim arising from the use of the platform is limited to the fees paid by you in the 12 months preceding the claim, or the minimum amount permitted by applicable law.
